creator: vermaden@interia.pl
text:
When I run FreeBSD 11.x with boot_mute=YES in /boot/loader.conf file instead of kernel messages the FreeBSD logo was displayed as shown on image below:
https://vermaden.files.wordpress.com/2018/03/stage4a-mod-native-boot-a.jpg

After new installation of 12.1-BETA2 the logo is no longer displayed.

Regards.
